description: J.T. Liss discusses the future of one-on-one art at Accelerate 2025, emphasizing the importance of education, collaboration, and outreach for artists and collectors. He highlights Exchange Art as a unique artist-led marketplace in Web3, focusing on grassroots cultural movements and providing resources for artists to thrive.
topic_summary: At [t=0:00], J.T. Liss introduces the concept of one-on-one art. He explains Exchange Art's role as an artist-led marketplace at [t=14:88]. The discussion covers key values like education and collaboration, with initiatives to support artists through workshops and grants, as well as partnerships with other marketplaces at [t=200:34].
